spec_match.rationale: The simulated and actual modes correctly map the visualViewport.segments structure described in the specification.

interactive.rationale: The selector allows picking between simulated devices and also supports checking the real browser visualViewport segment configuration.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The description aligns well with the spec's motivation to expose physical viewport segments to avoid content splitting.

edge_cases.rationale: Graceful fallback checks API availability and notifies user if the browser does not support physical viewport segments.

references.rationale: Includes ChromeStatus entry link and Visual Viewport specification reference link.

design_system.rationale: Utilizes existing CSS variables from style system and preserves clean layout.

summary: A very clean and concise demonstration of visualViewport.segments API with mock fold device simulator.
